title: BundleInPalette
description: Bundle In Palette adds sixteen dyed variants of the vanilla bundle so you can color-code your inventory and storage.
body:
# Bundle In Palette

Bundle In Palette adds sixteen dyed variants of the vanilla bundle so you can color-code your inventory and storage.  
This mod **requires [Bundle In Creative](https://modrinth.com/mod/bundleincreative)** (or any mod that restores the vanilla bundle recipe) so the new dyes have something to tint.

![Dyed Bundles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1119dfd7d11ef3c739070f385b64ddfcdb56bbf1.png)

## Features
- 16 bespoke bundle textures covering every vanilla dye color.
- Shapeless recipes: combine one vanilla bundle with any dye to recolor it.
- Automatically injected into the Tools & Utilities creative tab.
- All bundles (vanilla + dyed) share the `forge:bundles` item tag for compatibility.
- Target platform: Minecraft **1.20.1** / Forge **47.x**.

## Optional Tooltip Tinting
- Dyed bundles can tint their tooltip background to match their dye. This is **off by default** to keep vanilla styling.
- Enable via configs with a config UI mod like Configured. You can also edit `config/bundleinpalette-client.toml` (`dyedBundleTooltipColors=true`).

![BundleInPalette Tooltip Tints](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1bac10021d325a3c7c74944bf9ac1a9f24feef0d.gif)

## Crafting
```
Bundle + Any Dye -> Matching Dyed Bundle
```
Recipes unlock once you obtain at least one vanilla bundle.
